2012June 10, 2012

🇸🇪 Stockholm, Sweden

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Stockholm, Sweden, June 10, 2012 -- June 15, 2012

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2012-06-stockholm-sweden

19 Resolutions

839Plenary
Develop New Work Item Proposal for ISO 14306 second edition
SC 4 requests WG 12 to develop a New Work Item Proposal for a new edition of ISO 14306 including but not limited to replacing XT Brep and JT Brep with STEP curve, surface and Brep entity definition...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
838Plenary
Submit revised ISO 14306 for FDIS ballot
SC 4 requests WG 12 to develop a revised version of the specification incorporating the agreed changes from SC4N2780.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
837Plenary
Request TC 184 to avoid duplication with ISO/TC 261
SC 4 requests the TC 184 to take all necessary steps to avoid any duplication or inconsistency of deliverables.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
836Plenary
Establish liaison to ISO/TC 261 for additive manufacturing
SC 4 requests its secretariat to establish a liaison to TC 261.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
835Plenary
Reappoint leaders for SC 4 Implementation Forum
SC 4 approves re-appointment of the following leaders for the Advisory Group "SC 4 Implementation Forum": * Leader: Paul van Exel, USPI (The Netherlands) * Co-Deputy Leader: Dr. Anna Moreno, ENEA (...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
834Plenary
Reappoint Tim King as WG 13 Convenor
SC 4 approves Tim King, United Kingdom, to serve as Convenor of its Working Group 13 for an additional period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
833Plenary
Reappoint Keith Hunten as WG 12 Convenor
SC 4 approves Keith Hunten, United States, to serve as Convenor of its Working Group 12 for an additional period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
832Plenary
Reappoint Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle as JWG 8 Convenor
SC 4 re-appoints Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle, France as convener of JWG 8 for a three-year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
831Plenary
Appoint Eric Sardet as Deputy Convener for WG 2
SC 4 appoints Eric Sardet as Deputy Convener for WG 2, with appreciation for his offer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
830Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects:
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Guy Pierra for his faithful service as Deputy Convener for SC 4/WG 2 (Standard for the Neutral Representation of Standard Parts) since 2001 and regrets that he is not available to conti...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its recognition and thanks for her exceptional dedication and service for the past three years in the position of Convenor.

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its special recognition and thanks for his exceptional dedication and service for the past three years in the position of Convenor.

SC 4 expresses its special recognition and thanks for his exceptional dedication and service for the past three years in the position of Convenor.

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
